response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in distributed systems, low-latency applications, and geospatial data processing through his work on GISCollective. However, his recent professional experience heavily favors TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. His last professional C/C++ role dates back to 2015, and he lists no Rust experience. While his geospatial domain knowledge and systems engineering background are excellent, the lack of recent modern C++ or Rust experience makes him a borderline candidate for this specific technology stack.
strengths: Extensive domain experience building and maintaining geospatial data platforms (GISCollective).
Proven track record with low-latency, high-throughput microservices and distributed systems.
Strong polyglot background with an emphasis on software craftsmanship, testing (TDD), and automation.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with modern C++ (last used professionally in 2015 at National Instruments).
No professional experience with Rust, which is the primary acceptable alternative for this role.
Recent professional roles are heavily focused on web and full-stack technologies (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than core systems engineering.
